3235650.name: 出張 Business trip
3235650.description:
You are on a business trip and will be staying 3 nights at a business hotel.

You check in and the room you enter is a normal business hotel room with a bathroom and a bed.

If you find anomaly in your room, you contact the front desk and ask to have your room changed. If there is nothing wrong with the room, you will sleep in the bed.

"Business trip" is a short game played from the first person view.

It takes about 20 to 60 minutes to play.

The controls are very simple.

Mouse and WASD keys for walking. Left click to select and right click to zoom only.

If you are easily intoxicated, please lower the sensitivity of the mouse.

You are free to make your own video streaming.

However, you are responsible for any damage caused by posting and distributing videos.
